$surface: In-app help drawer on /setup — the activation wizard
$voiceCadence: calm, decisive — walking a tradie through ten minutes of work
$revisionNote: Sandbox auth was down at capture time. Placeholder body scenes used instead of authenticated /setup screenshots.

storyboard.onScreenText: Activate RestoreAssist in about ten minutes.
storyboard.voiceover: Activate RestoreAssist in about ten minutes. One ABN, one accounting link, one demo job.

storyboard.onScreenText: Slash setup — five sections, each with a green tick when ready.
storyboard.voiceover: When you land on slash setup, you see five sections. Business details, accounting, IICRC credentials, sample data, and activation. Each goes green when it's ready.

data.footnote: Five sections · green ticks track your progress.

storyboard.onScreenText: Start with your ABN — we do the rest.
storyboard.voiceover: Start with your A B N. Paste the eleven-digit number. We look it up against the Australian Business Register and pre-fill your trading name, registered state, and GST status.

keypoints: We hit the Australian Business Register live.
Trading name, state, GST status — all pre-filled.

storyboard.onScreenText: Watch each section tick green as we hydrate.
storyboard.voiceover: Once your A B N validates, we start hydrating the rest. Each section flips from grey to green as it completes — usually within fifteen seconds.

flowSteps: IICRC matrix loaded → Credential pack ready

storyboard.onScreenText: Connect your accounting — one click, OAuth.
storyboard.voiceover: Section two is accounting. Click your platform — Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks, ServiceM8 or Ascora. You log in once on their side. We never see your password.

keypoints: OAuth on their domain — we never store credentials.
Invoices sync both ways from day one.

storyboard.onScreenText: Add your IICRC ticket numbers — we verify.
storyboard.voiceover: Section three takes your IICRC ticket numbers. WRT, ASD, FSRT, AMRT. We verify each against the IICRC registry so insurers trust your inspections from day one.

storyboard.onScreenText: Section four — sample data so the dashboard isn't empty.
storyboard.voiceover: Section four offers sample data — a Category Two water damage job with moisture readings, equipment, and photos. It's optional, but useful for the first walk-through.

data.footnote: Optional · adds one demo job to your dashboard.

storyboard.onScreenText: All five green? Hit Activate. You're live.
storyboard.voiceover: When all five sections show green, the Activate button unlocks. One click writes your subscription, fires onboarding emails, and lands you on the dashboard.

data.footnote: Activate writes your subscription and lands you on /dashboard.

storyboard.onScreenText: After activation, you can start working immediately.
storyboard.voiceover: After activation you land on the dashboard, with a first-run banner explaining what each tile does. Three videos to watch — dashboard tour, integrations, and workspace health.

storyboard.onScreenText: Ten minutes to live. One National Inspection Standard.
storyboard.voiceover: Ten minutes to live. RestoreAssist. One National Inspection Standard. Open slash setup and start.

storyboard.onScreenText: Stuck? The help drawer answers every section.
storyboard.voiceover: Stuck on a section? Tap the help icon — every section has a one-minute refresher right next to it.
